topic: Man City match recap — brilliant or terrible

turns.content: did you see the City match last night?? absolute scenes
I don't have access to live match results, but I can tell from the exclamation marks that something dramatic happened! What went down?

3-2 win but we were 2-0 down at half time. I was sat there thinking here we go again another shocker and then second half they just turned into a completely different team. Haaland scored twice in like 10 minutes

A 3-2 comeback from 2-0 down is the kind of match that takes years off your life but also makes you remember why you love football. Haaland scoring twice in ten minutes is just absurd -- when he's in that mood, defenders might as well go home. Who got the third?
Foden. curler from outside the box in the 88th minute. I nearly woke the whole house up screaming. Simran came down and gave me a look like she wanted to murder me haha

An 88th-minute curler from Foden to complete the comeback -- that's the stuff that makes grown men lose their minds on the sofa. I completely understand the scream. Simran's reaction is the tax you pay for late-night football drama.

Were the kids watching with you or were they already in bed?

he was in bed but he heard me and came running down in his pyjamas asking what happened. I showed him the replay and he was jumping around the living room. Simran was not impressed with either of us at half 10 on a school night

Ha, I can picture the scene -- two City fans bouncing around in the living room at half ten while Simran stands in the doorway wondering how she ended up with two of them. But honestly, those are the moments Arjun will remember forever. Years from now he'll tell people about the time he came downstairs in his pyjamas and watched the Foden goal with his dad.

Did Simran eventually forgive you both or was it frosty this morning?
she was fine this morning haha. she doesnt really get football but she knows it makes us happy so she puts up with it. I made her a cup of tea this morning as a peace offering and that sorted it

A well-timed cup of tea fixes most things. Smart move. And credit to Simran for being understanding about it -- not every partner would take a half-ten wake-up call from football celebrations that gracefully.

How are City looking overall this season? Is the form picking up or was last night more of a one-off?

honestly its been up and down. some games weve looked brilliant and then the next week its like watching a completely different squad. the defence is still dodgy which is why we were 2-0 down in the first place. but when the attack clicks theres nobody better. Haaland is a machine

That inconsistency is frustrating when you know the quality is there. Being able to come back from 2-0 shows the mentality and attacking firepower are still elite, but conceding two in the first half shouldn't be happening at that level. If they can tighten up at the back and keep the attack rolling like last night, they're right in the title race. If the defence keeps leaking goals, it's going to cost them in the big matches.

Haaland's numbers are just silly at this point. How many has he got this season so far?
lost count but hes on pace for another golden boot easy. the man scores for fun. its like having a cheat code innit. Arjun wants a Haaland shirt for christmas now obviously

Of course he does — after watching his dad lose his mind over a Haaland brace at half ten on a school night, the shirt is inevitable. At least it's an easy present to sort. Just make sure you get the right season's kit or he'll let you know about it. Kids are ruthless about that stuff.
haha true. right I better crack on mate, got a boiler service in Moseley at 9. just had to share that with someone cos Im still buzzing from last night
Enjoy the buzz -- a comeback like that keeps you going all day. Hope the boiler service goes smoothly. Have a good one, mate!
